title: CURVER Rectangular Glass Airtight Food Storage Container - 2.7L Capacity with Clip Lock - Easy Storage & Keeps Food Fresh - Freezer & Oven Safe
features: LOCK IN FRESHNESS, LOCK OUT WASTE: With a precision-engineered clip-lock lid and freshness seal, this glass container keeps meals tasting just-made—reducing food waste and saving you money every single week.

YOUR ALL-IN-ONE KITCHEN HERO: Prep, cook, freeze, and reheat—all in the same borosilicate glass container. From oven to microwave to fridge, this is your space-saving, time-saving food storage revolution.
FORM MEETS FUNCTION: The clean, rounded design fits neatly in your hand and your fridge, making this a perfect storage solution.

COOK MINDFULLY, LIVE CONSCIOUSLY: Dishwasher safe, oven safe (glass base only), and crafted with sustainability in mind—this glass container with lid helps you cook consciously and eliminate the guilt of throwaway culture.

ELEVATE YOUR EVERYDAY MEAL PREP: Perfectly portioned at 2.7l, this container helps you prep with purpose—bringing ease, elegance, and intention to everything from weekday lunches to mindful leftovers.
